title: L10N-002: i18n Key Parity Test for 17 Locales
consumer_purpose: Ensure all 17 locale files have every user-facing key defined in en.ts and that all t() calls in source code reference keys that exist in en.ts
content:
# L10N-002: i18n Key Parity Test (REVISED)

## Changes from v1
- Replaced rg subprocess with pure TypeScript file walking (portable to Windows CI)
- Added source file:line tracking for each extracted key
- Defined typed allowlist schema with reason + optional locale scope
- Added stale allowlist detection (keys that now exist in all locales)
- Exclude *.test.ts and *.test.tsx from source scan to prevent false-positives
- Single test file (no separate extract-keys helper needed)

## Scope
- Modify: `packages/app/src/i18n/parity.test.ts` (complete rewrite)

## Design

### Test Structure
```
Test 1: "en.ts key parity" — every locale has all en.ts keys
Test 2: "code key completeness" — every literal t() call key is in en.ts (or allowlisted)
Test 3: "allowlist freshness" — no stale allowlist entries
```

### Key Extraction (pure TypeScript)
```
function walkDir(dir, exts) → recursive file walker
function extractCodeKeys() → [{key, file, line}] from all .ts/.tsx files
```
- Uses `fs.readdirSync` + `fs.readFileSync` + regex
- Regex: `/(\w+)\.t\(["'`]([^"'`]+)["'`]\)/g` — captures `language.t("key")` etc
- Excludes `*.test.*` files
- Excludes `node_modules/`
- Tracks source file + line number for error messages

### Exception Allowlist
```typescript
type AllowlistEntry = { reason: string; locales?: string[] }
// locales = which locales are exempt; omitted means all locales exempt from key-in-en.ts check
// Key in allowlist but found present in all locales → stale → test fails
```

Entries include:
- `ui.*` keys (from UI package, not app en.ts) — app-wide exempt
- `dialog.mcp.error` (orphan key used in code, not in any locale) — app-wide exempt

### Dynamic Calls Handling
~20 dynamic call sites detected (ternary, variable-passing, template-literal). These are:
- Not captured by literal extraction regex (by design)
- Known enums resolved at runtime
- Verified to exist in en.ts via existing locale parity test
- Explicitly documented in code comments

### CI Integration
Test auto-discovered by `bun test --preload ./happydom.ts ./src` — no pipeline changes needed.

## What We Do NOT Do
- Do NOT modify any locale file
- Do NOT touch the fallback implementation
- Do NOT modify CI pipeline
- Do NOT touch UI or desktop i18n packages
- Do NOT add `rg` as a dependency
revision_reason: Address critic concerns: use pure TypeScript (no rg), add source-location tracking, define allowlist schema, handle dynamic calls, add stale-entry detection
